allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /insta|faceb|twit/i.test\(k\)\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(typeof l.Instagram, typeof l.Facebook, typeof l.Twitter\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const all = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(all.filter\(k => k.includes\('Mail'\) || k.includes\('Globe'\) || k.includes\('Map'\)\).slice\(0,10\).join\(', '\)\)")
